features.name: first_match with OR sequence
features.description: Code should include a first_match() operator applied to a sequence expression using the OR operator

features.name: first_match in assert property
features.description: Code should include a first_match() sequence operator inside an assert property statement with clocking
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) first_match(a or b) |-> (a | b));

features.name: sequence OR operator in SVA
features.description: Code should include two or more sequences combined with the OR operator in an SVA property context

features.name: SVA implication operator
features.description: Code should include the overlapping implication operator |-> between two expressions in an SVA property
